Each unit is inspected before it is dispatched.
The report was submitted to the board yesterday.
A year ago, Izabel prepared every report by hand.
Izabel, a new partner asked me how everything actually gets made at AVRT. Could you walk us through the process?
Of course. First, the components are designed in-house, and the units are manufactured here in Valinhos.
And how is quality controlled?
Every batch is inspected by the quality team, and each unit is tested. Once a product is certified, it is approved for shipping.
Good. What happens after that?
The orders are labeled, packed, and dispatched to North America. Every shipment is monitored, and the data is stored in one system.
And the numbers? How is the reporting handled?
Each quarter, the accounts are audited, the report is reviewed, and then it is submitted to the board.
The components are manufactured in Valinhos and inspected on site.
Once a product is certified, it is approved for shipping.
Every order is labeled, dispatched, and monitored.
The accounts are audited every quarter.
The report is reviewed and then submitted to the board.

Hi Izabel, this is Greg from the plant, with a quick summary of how things are running before Thursday. All the components for this month have been manufactured, and the last batch was assembled on Tuesday. Every unit has been inspected, and nothing is dispatched until it is certified. The orders for North America were labeled and packed yesterday, and they are being monitored on the way to the client. One more thing: the delivery data is now stored automatically, so it does not have to be entered by hand anymore. Everything is on track. Talk on Thursday.

Good morning, Izabel. This is Diana, from the audit firm, with a short update before the call. The quarterly accounts have been audited, and I am glad to say the figures are clean. Every invoice was checked, and each payment has been matched to a record. A few small items were flagged, but they have already been corrected. The full report has been prepared, and once it is reviewed by you, it can be submitted to the board. Overall, the process is well controlled, and the numbers can be trusted. Thank you, and talk soon.
